title: Wynxx SDLC execution record
description: One record per MCP tool execution. The MCP server emits the tool-level subset; Agent Gateway and the orchestration layer enrich it with identity, tenant, and artifact context before it is streamed to BigQuery.

execution_id.description: Unique id for this tool invocation.

agent_identity.description: mTLS-secured persona of the calling agent (added by Agent Gateway).

user_id.description: End user on whose behalf the call was made.

tenant_id.description: Tenant / client partition for multi-tenant deployments.

mcp_server.description: Logical MCP server id from Agent Registry.

backend_mode.description: Whether the call hit the stub or the live backend.

model_armor_verdict.description: Verdict from Model Armor at the gateway.

artifacts.description: Artifacts produced or referenced by the execution.

trace_id.description: W3C / OpenTelemetry trace id for the full call chain.
